title: test

steps.text: mettre les outils sur la table

genText:
I. preparation tools  
1. Place the tools on the table (see photo)  

II. Assembly  
1. Begin assembling the components according to the specifications outlined in the assembly manual.  
2. Ensure all parts are aligned correctly before fastening.  

III. Quality Control  
1. Inspect the assembled product for any defects.  
2. Test the functionality of the product to ensure it meets operational standards.
